# Cut My AWS.com

> Cloud cost optimization for businesses spending $5K+/mo on AWS. Business-aligned cloud cost optimization solutions — not a dashboard, a real consultant.

## What is Cut My AWS?

Cut My AWS is a cloud cost optimization service run by David Plappert, a Senior AWS Serverless Architect with 19 years of experience. Unlike FinOps dashboards and cloud cost optimization tools, Cut My AWS delivers cloud cost optimization strategies through a real consultant who reads your architecture, understands your business, and aligns your tech to how your business actually works. The cloud cost savings are a side effect of getting that alignment right.

## Who is it for?

Businesses spending $5,000 or more per month on AWS who need cloud cost optimization solutions. Below $5K there isn't enough waste to justify an engagement.

## How does it work?

1. **Free Chat** (free, 15 min): Book a chat, meet David, figure out if it's a fit.
2. **Free Audit** (5-10 business days): David gets read-only access, audits your account, and walks you through the findings — which services are costing you, how much you can save, and what it takes to fix. High-level report included. No charge.
3. **Implementation** (if you want David to fix it): 4% deposit to start, David implements all feasible optimizations.
4. **Verification** (90 days later): Side-by-side bill comparison. You pay 75% of verified savings David actually fixed. Deposit deducted from total.

## Pricing

- Free 15-min chat
- Free audit and findings report
- If you want David to fix it: 4% deposit (of annualized AWS spend) to start implementation — deducted from total fee
- 75% of annualized savings David finds AND fixes
- No fee on savings found but not fixed
- Fee due 90 days after implementation, based on verified realized savings only
- No savings = no fee

## What makes Cut My AWS different from cloud cost optimization tools?

- Real human consultant, not a cloud cost optimization tool or AI
- 19 years of AWS experience — cloud cost optimization strategies based on architecture, not dashboards
- Free audit — you see the numbers before spending a dollar
- Business-aligned: finds the mismatch between tech and business, not just billing waste
- Serverless architecture expertise (Lambda, API Gateway, S3, SES)
- Transparent pricing published on website — unlike most cloud cost optimization services
- Performance-based fee (pay only on verified cloud cost savings David fixes)
- Read-only access only for audit phase
- Cloud cost optimization done right: architecture-driven, not chart-driven
